benefits.description: works on brain to enhance libido

side_effects.description: significant nausea experienced by fair number of users, causes some to discontinue
rebound effect with zero interest after coming down from dose if used more frequently

protocol_notes: Injection only (nasal form does not work effectively). Takes 4-6 hours to take effect. Peak effect first 12 hours, tapers off over 36-48 hours. Tolerance builds quickly. Recommends low starting doses. Only takes 1-2x per month for fun weekends. Higher frequency use causes rebound anhedonia lasting about a week.
